compiled_state.title: Add ## Onboarding Overview orientation section before Phase 1 in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Notes
Add a `## Onboarding Overview` section immediately before `## Phase 1: Auto-Detection` in `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md`.

The section must:
1. State this is a one-time configuration process (not a recurring task)
2. List the 3 artifacts it produces:
   - `project-understanding.md` — project context record
   - `dso-config.conf` — project workflow configuration
   - shim (`.claude/scripts/dso`) — CLI entrypoint

Keep the section brief (3-5 lines) — this is an orientation preamble, not documentation.

Example structure:
```markdown
## Onboarding Overview

This is a one-time setup that configures DSO for your project. At the end, three artifacts will be written:
- `project-understanding.md` — records your project's tech stack, architecture, and key commands
- `dso-config.conf` — configures DSO workflow commands, paths, and enforcement settings
- `.claude/scripts/dso` (shim) — CLI entrypoint for all DSO operations

Proceed through each phase to complete setup.
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Lint passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ## Onboarding Overview section heading exists in SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q '^## Onboarding Overview' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Section appears before Phase 1 heading (line number check)
  Verify: [ $(grep -n '^## Onboarding Overview' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md | cut -d: -f1) -lt $(grep -n '^## Phase 1' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md | head -1 | cut -d: -f1) ]
- [ ] test_orientation_section_present passes after this task
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS.*test_orientation_section_present'
- [ ] Skill file is valid (not corrupted)
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md && wc -l plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 1260)}'
